MOKOUMOD-BURNING_PLUME.description: Start each combat with [blue]{RekindlePower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Rekindle[/gold] and [green]{RegenPower:diff()}[/green] [gold]Regen[/gold]. On entering a new [gold]Act[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Essence[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-BURNING_PLUME.title: Burning Plume

MOKOUMOD-IMMORTAL_PLUME.title: Immortal Plume
